# 🎯 Task 03.1: Link Extraction

## 📅 Sprint Info
- **Duration:** 4 days | **Milestone:** M2 | **Priority:** P1
- **Depends On:** Task 02.6 ✅ | **Blocks:** 03.2

## 🎬 What You'll Build
Extract outlinks/inlinks from crawled HTML pages. Build foundation for link graph and PageRank computation.

## 📋 Daily Tasks
**Day 1-2:** HTML link parser, URL normalization, anchor text extraction  
**Day 3:** MongoDB schema design, efficient graph storage  
**Day 4:** Scale testing (10M+ pages), performance optimization

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- Extracts all valid links (href, src) from HTML
- Processes 10K+ pages/sec
- Stores efficiently in MongoDB
- Preserves anchor text and link context

## 📊 Required Evidence
- HTML fixture set covering absolute, relative, canonical, malformed, nofollow, media, and script-generated link cases.
- Extraction accuracy report with sampled false positives and false negatives.
- URL normalization report for Persian/IDN domains, query strings, fragments, redirects, and duplicate variants.
- Throughput benchmark with page count, average HTML size, hardware, and storage write rate.

## 🎉 Celebration: Visualize link graph!
## 📦 Delivers: `link_extractor.py`, tests, docs
## 🚀 Next: Task 03.2 (Host Graph)
